top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > (SELECT MAX(UA) FROM Laboratory WHERE UA IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS percentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'F' 
    AND l.UA IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.UA > (SELECT MAX(UA) FROM Laboratory) THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS percentage
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE P.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > (SELECT MAX(UA) FROM Laboratory WHERE UA IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS percentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'F' 
    AND l.UA IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.UA > (SELECT MAX(UA) FROM Laboratory) THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS percentage
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE P.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > (SELECT AVG(UA) FROM Laboratory WHERE UA IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / 
    SUM(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS percentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'F';

SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > (SELECT MAX(UA) FROM Laboratory WHERE UA IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS percentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'F' 
    AND l.UA IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > (SELECT AVG(UA) FROM Laboratory WHERE UA IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END), 2) AS percentage
FROM 
    Patient p
INNER JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'F' 
    AND l.UA IS NOT NULL;

SELECT 
    ROUND(
        CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN L.UA > (SELECT MAX(UA) FROM Laboratory) THEN 1 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*), 
        2
    ) AS percentage
FROM Patient P
JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID
WHERE P.SEX = 'F';

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' AND l.UA > (SELECT MAX(UA) FROM Laboratory WHERE UA IS NOT NULL) THEN 1 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(CASE WHEN p.SEX = 'F' THEN 1 END) AS percentage
FROM 
    Patient p
JOIN 
    Laboratory l ON p.ID = l.ID
WHERE 
    p.SEX = 'F' 
    AND l.UA IS NOT NULL;
